speaker: Alex
text: Good, but is Antony still a little possessive? 😞

speaker: Annie
text: A bit… sometimes I feel his jealousy like a storm. 😬

speaker: Annie
text: I know, and thanks for always being here. You’re my safe place. 🤗❤️

speaker: Alex
text: Always! Ice cream tomorrow? Pure happiness. 🍦 🤩

speaker: Annie
text: Yes please. I need a break from all this college madness. 🤩

speaker: Alex
text: Same here. Exams next week are giving me tiredness already. 😩

speaker: Annie
text: We’ll survive. After ice cream we can watch a silly movie and just enjoy the joy. 😀

speaker: Alex
text: Perfect plan. Friendship therapy is the best kind of wellness. 🙏
